ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election took place */,
  "district" INTEGER /* Congressional district number */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who won the election */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party of the winning candidate */,
  "democratic_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the Democratic candidate */,
  "republican_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the Republican candidate */,
  "other_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by other candidates */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "winner_declaration_time" TEXT /* Time when the winner was declared */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  "electoral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of electoral votes the state has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district is in */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the congressional district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "majority_party" TEXT /* Party that holds the majority in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "campaign_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's campaign website */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the party */,
  "party_platform_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's official platform */,
  "national_leader" TEXT /* Name of the national leader of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "age_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the age of voters */,
  "ethnic_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the ethnicity of voters */,
  "education_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the education level of voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_statistics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the predicted election */,
  "predicted_winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predicted winning candidate */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_predictions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_predictions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_predictions_predicted_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each election result
